channel.title: Networking on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Bill's Blog

item.title: Debugging a Dead VMware NAT and Hardening My pfSense Containment Lab
item.description: A Windows update silently re-enabled the hypervisor and killed my VMware lab's networking. The diagnosis, the fix, and the pfSense rebuild — bridged WAN plus egress rules — that came out of it.

item.title: Hardening and Segmenting My Home Network on an Arcadyan HWG2025
item.description: How I hardened and segmented my home network on an ISP-provided Wi-Fi 7 router — and the DNS gotcha that makes doing it properly harder than it should be.
